## Checklist

- [ ] Idempotent where applicable
- [ ] Cross-platform guarded (`$IsWindows` / `$IsLinux`)
- [ ] `docs/MANUAL.md` updated if user-facing change
- [ ] `AGENTS.md` / `CLAUDE.md` updated if architecture change
